topStories.title: Why isn't Artemis II landing on the Moon?
topStories.description: The US is aiming to be the first country to land humans on the lunar surface again by 2028 - so what's this mission for?

topStories.title: Who is Todd Blanche? Trump replaces Pam Bondi as US Attorney General with his former personal lawyer
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump has replaced Attorney General Pam Bondi with his former personal lawyer and Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, who has previously defended Trump in several cases. Here's all you need to know about the interim attorney general

topStories.title: Pam Bondi fired by Trump- From POTUS' Attorney General pick to ouster – timeline of how she rose to prominence
topStories.description: Pam Bondi – a Trump loyalist, who oversaw Justice Department upheaval – is the first woman who has served as Florida's Attorney General. Trump, in his Truth Social post, described her as a ‘Great American Patriot and a loyal friend’

dailyNews.title: Trump targets Starmer over war support after Macron jibe — ‘By then, war might be over’

dailyNews.title: Karoline Leavitt lashes out at Politico over preview of Trump address on Iran
dailyNews.description: Karoline Leavitt slammed Politico on Wednesday over a report about President Donald Trump's speech on the war in Iran in a post to X.

dailyNews.description: Diamond Wallace faces felony homicide charges for allegedly shooting former co-worker Christine Jones in a politically motivated attack in Wisconsin.

dailyNews.title: Fatal drug combination sparks alert as 'rhino tranq’ spreads across US

dailyNews.title: Who Is Todd Blanche, Trump’s Acting Attorney General?
dailyNews.description: While it remains unclear how long Todd Blanche will stay in the job, whoever ends up taking over permanently will lead a department that he has shaped in his own image.

dailyNews.title: Trump Hails Destruction of Iranian Bridge, Warning ‘More to Follow’
dailyNews.description: Fars, a semiofficial news agency, said eight people had been killed in the attack and dozens wounded.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He’ll End the Iran War in Weeks. What If He Can’t?
dailyNews.description: President Trump faces the possibility that at the end of his own two-to-three week window for wrapping up the war in Iran, nothing much will have changed.

dailyNews.title: War With Iran Clarifies Trump’s Spending Priorities: The Military, Not Child Care
dailyNews.description: As the White House prepares to release its 2027 budget, President Trump said military protection, not social programs, took precedence.

dailyNews.title: In Supreme Court Birthright Citizenship Case, Trump’s Likely Loss May Not End the Fight
dailyNews.description: The justices gave respectful consideration to what was once a fringe theory and could rule against it on grounds that would allow Congress to return to the question.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Media-Bashing Is Coming Back to Bite Him in Court
dailyNews.description: Judges have cited attacks on the press by the president and his appointees when ruling against the government in at least three court cases.
